param.value: Password aur Confirm Password alag hain — error aana chahiye
Bahut chhota password — min 8 chars ka error aana chahiye
3 char password — sirf relevant error message aana chahiye
Sirf numbers wala weak password — reject hona chahiye
Valid 8 char password — accept hona chahiye (BUG_032 fixed)

exception.message: [TC_PASS_005_ValidPassword_8chars] Registration honi chahiye thi lekin nahi hui
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: [TC_PASS_005_ValidPassword_8chars] Registration honi chahiye thi lekin nahi hui at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at param.value: Valid password (upper+lower+number+special) — accept hona chahiye (BUG_047 fixed)

param.value: Password me space — allowed hai (passphrase standard, BUG_043 Not a bug)

param.value: Email username sirf special chars — reject hona chahiye (BUG_048 fixed)
Email me trailing space — reject hona chahiye (BUG_046)
Completely valid data — registration PASS hona chahiye (BUG_009)

param.value: Already registered email — clear error message aana chahiye (BUG_063)
Name fields me numbers — reject hona chahiye (BUG_010/040 fixed)
Last name sirf dots — reject hona chahiye (BUG_041 fixed)
First name sirf underscores — reject hona chahiye (BUG_049 fixed)
1407 char name — restrict ya error hona chahiye (BUG_013)
Last name khali — mandatory field error aana chahiye (BUG_044 fixed)
Numeric names + dot password — validation error aana chahiye (BUG_011)
Terms checkbox nahi click kiya — submit nahi hona chahiye (BUG_045)
Sahi email + password — login hona chahiye (BUG_017 pending)
Verified account se login — 'verify email' error nahi aana chahiye (BUG_026)
Forgot Password link — Reset page khulna chahiye, 404 nahi (BUG_035 fixed)
Unregistered email — generic message aana chahiye, registration status reveal nahi (BUG_037 fixed)
Terms & Conditions + Privacy Policy links — sahi page khulna chahiye (Already passing)
